race.description: Port City Glass Country Boosted Showcase Hcp (Bm58)
race.comment: YOUWROTEUPONIT (1) resumed for the new yard with instant success, when leading throughout over 1000m at this track with the 59kg. Can repeat the dose with the 2kg claim and proven at the trip. Hard to run down. SIRSA NUWA (4) peaked on the run first-up with a fading fifth over 1000m at this track on the heavy surface. Won over this track and trip two-back and can overcome the sticky gate. BARCELONA EXPRESS (3) came back in trip when he surged late in the heavy conditions to run third over 1218m at Coffs Harbour. Claim helps and capable of running a bold race. SUNSTAZ (7) finally got the job done at start seven with a surprise Maiden win over 1206m at this track. Kept fresh and can run into the minor money. EVIL LOVER (9) in career best form and look for her late from the wide draw.
